title: coelogyne convallariiformis var. convallariiformis
intro: Coelogyne convallariiformis var. convallariiformis is a variety of orchid that belongs to the Coelogyne genus, known for its unique and exotic appearance. This orchid species has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne convallariiformis var. convallariiformis include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and its roots are also used to make tinctures and ointments.
